qt: _______________________ is the maker of bill of exchange in a trade agreement.

Blank endorsement is also called _____________________.

An endorsement is said to be restrictive endorsement under which of the following condition?
op: If the endorser signs his name only
If the endorser adds a direction to pay the amount mentioned in the instrument to, or to the order of, a specified person
If the endorser purports to transfer to the endorsee only a part of the amount payable
If the endorser restricts or excludes the right to further negotiate the instrument
ca: If the endorser restricts or excludes the right to further negotiate the instrument

qt: In a bill of exchange the maker is the _______________________________.
Mr.Ahmad directs Mr.Ali to pay Rs: 100,000 to Mr.Tahir on 1st of July 2021. Who can be the endorser in this case?
A person who signs a negotiable instrument as a maker, drawer, acceptor or endorser without receiving its value is called ______________________________.
Mr.Aslam presents cheque for payment on a cash counter with his name specified in in the payee part of the cheque is holding a ________________________ .
I promise to pay Mr.Ahmad Rs: 100, 000, thirty days after getting admission in University does not qualify for a promissory note because __________________.
op: Time of payment is not certain
ca: Time of payment is not certain

qt: Which of the following is NOT defined by the Negotiable Instrument Act, 1881?

Loan compositions of banks vary due to following factors Except:

Which one of the following is a continuous and integral part of the credit life cycle?
op: Follow up and monitoring of the loan
To analyze the paying capacity of the borrower
To conduct the financial analysis of the borrowers financial statements
ca: Follow up and monitoring of the loan

qt: Banks can _____________________ to avoid liquidity risk.

op: Thirty days after date, I owe to pay Mr.Ahamd or order the sum of rupees one hundred thousand only and the amounts which may be due to Ahmad by date.
I owe Rs 10,000 to Mr. Ahmad

qt: Banks involve in off-balance sheet activities to earn profit. Which one of the following is not an off-balance sheet item?
If the endorser adds a direction to pay the amount mentioned in the instrument to, or to the order of, a specified person it is called ____________________________.
In a promissory note the maker is the ____________________.
Following are the conditions of a person to be called as “Holder in due course” Except:
op: He must have obtained the instrument in good faith
He obtains the instrument for valuable consideration
He becomes the holder of the instrument after maturity
He must take the instrument complete on the face of it
ca: He becomes the holder of the instrument after maturity

qt: The alteration of date, time or the sum payable in relation to promissory notes, bill of exchange or cheque is called ______________________.

An agent can be personally liable if he does the following acts EXCEPT:
op: If he executes an instrument without his authority
If he indorse an instrument with authority but in excess of his authority
If he does not indicate that he is an agent
If he does not disclose the name of his principal
ca: If he indorse an instrument with authority but in excess of his authority

qt: Banks’s depositors are the creditors of the bank. They can demand their deposited money from the bank any time. If a bank fails to pay a customer his deposited money on demand the bank is facing ___________________ risk.
If the endorser signs his name only it is called ____________________________.
If a borrower fails to repay its principal or interest amount to a bank, which type of risk the bank is facing _______________________.
Mr. Aslam presents a cheque for payment on a bank’s cash counter is holding a _________________ .
A cheque is crossed as payees account only can be ___________________________.
op: Can be credited to payee account
Paid at cash counter to payee
Can be credited to any account
ca: Can be credited to payee account

qt: An agent can accept and indorse a bill of exchange if he fulfills the following conditions EXCEPT:
op: The agent has been authorized by the principal
The principal is a competent person to assign an authority
The agent can act on his own name
The agent has been authorized in clear terms
ca: The agent can act on his own name

op: A promise to pay the bearer
A promise to pay a certain sum of money to a person

ca: Operated by the father of any of the accountholder in his absence

qt: A banker receives a stop payment instruction of a cheque by any one of the joint account holders; banker can make the payment against that cheque if the payment instruction is signed by
op: Father of any of the joint account holder
Any one of the joint account holders
ca: Any one of the joint account holders

op: To work for his personal interest

qt: Which of the following function(s) is/are performed by the banker as an agent for the customer?
op: Collection of dividends and bills of exchange
Buying and selling securities on his behalf

qt: Which of the following is termed as pledge?
op: The transfer of an interest in specific immoveable property for the purpose of securing the payment of money advanced or to be advanced by way of loan, an existing or future debt, or the performance of an engagement which may give rise to a pecuniary liability
Availing the locker facility from a bank
The bailment of goods as security for payment of a debt or performance of a promise
ca: The bailment of goods as security for payment of a debt or performance of a promise

qt: Availing the locker facility from a bank creates a ____________________ relationship between bank and customer.
Which of the following is the right of mortgagee?
op: Right to sell the mortgaged property in case of mortgager default

qt: Which of the following person is not allowed by law to open an account in the bank?
op: A person without hands or handicapped person

qt: Which of the following is referred as Bailment?
op: The delivery of goods by one person to another for some purpose, upon a contract that they shall, when the purpose is accomplished, be returned or otherwise disposed of according to the directions of the person delivering them
Availing the locker facility from a bank
Pledge of stocks as security for availing credit from bank
ca: The delivery of goods by one person to another for some purpose, upon a contract that they shall, when the purpose is accomplished, be returned or otherwise disposed of according to the directions of the person delivering them

qt: Which of the followings are the types of agent accounts EXCEPT:.
op: Account of a person without arms

qt: Following are the rights of the agent Except:
op: To pass on any benefits to the principal derived by him
To be indemnified against consequences of lawful acts
To get compensation for any injury caused by principal’s neglect
ca: To pass on any benefits to the principal derived by him
